games.name: Lumen
games.tagline: Every stone is a lamp and a wall. Light along its row & column until blocked. Cells lit by only you are yours; lit by both, worthless. Most territory wins.

games.name: Cascade
games.tagline: Place stones - they never move. Win the majority of a block's 9 cells to take the block; a majority of blocks wins the game. Own ~31% of the board and still take it all.

games.name: Fracture
games.tagline: Tap empty to place. Tap an enemy stone to shatter it into a new war. Win the line, own the cell.

games.name: Stamp
games.tagline: Design one tiny stamp. It contains itself. Match the fractal.

games.name: Seed
games.tagline: Design a plant's DNA - one rewrite rule. Grow it generation by generation to light every sun, dodge the thorns, and fit inside the cave.

games.name: Loom
games.tagline: Author up to three rewrite rules. The loom runs them tick by tick, leftmost match first, until the bead thread matches the target - or unravels to nothing, or grows forever. Markov algorithms wearing a bead necklace.

games.name: Echo
games.tagline: Rewind on the pad to spawn a replay of your past self. Choreograph the yous you used to be - hold each other's doors, dodge your own history - then sequence a clean shutdown where every loop closes. Recursion, written in time.
